Comment: Great Professor, probably a celebrity in this field, not kidding. His exams are somewhat difficult and he is a tough grader. But he is an amazing teacher, I can always say he is trying his best to teach the material. It was my great honor to have taken his classes. I took numerical methods, vibrations, and advanced solid mechanics with him.
Tags: Tough Grader, Get ready to read, ACCESSIBLE OUTSIDE CLASS
